title: Fix Close Button on Database DDL Export Modal
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the export button on the DDL export modal to work so that I can successfully export my database schema.
description: The export button on the database DDL export modal was not functioning. Clicking the export button had no effect, preventing users from exporting their database DDL.
acceptance_criteria: Export button on the DDL export modal triggers the export action
Close button on the DDL export modal closes the modal
ux_changes: Fixed the export button click handler on the DDL export modal.
comment_summary: Developer fixed the issue and submitted for review.
